name: HAPI OpenClaw Adapter
description: Bridge HAPI's OpenClaw UI to an OpenClaw-native plugin route surface.

hapiBaseUrl.label: HAPI Base URL
hapiBaseUrl.help: Base URL for the HAPI hub callback endpoint, for example http://127.0.0.1:3006.

sharedSecret.label: Shared Secret
sharedSecret.help: Shared secret used for HAPI bearer auth and plugin callback signing.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.help: Namespace attached to normalized callback events when omitted by HAPI.

prototypeCaptureSessionKey.label: Prototype Capture Session Key
prototypeCaptureSessionKey.help: Optional OpenClaw session key to record transcript updates for milestone-1 event-shape inspection.

prototypeCaptureFileName.label: Prototype Capture File
prototypeCaptureFileName.help: Optional file name for transcript-capture JSONL under the plugin state directory.
